SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: RELATIONSHIP_ID 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 3 

SOURCE: NCDPD DataQ™ 

VALUES: 3-digit alpha numeric or null/missing (relationship n/a) 

COMMENT: A single relationship ID will generally relate to more than one CCW_PHARM_ID (i.e., multiple
